{# `over_hero` is set by landing.html only. It makes the bar transparent and forces bone ink, because it is sitting on a photograph rather than on the themed page background. nav.js drops the attribute on first scroll. #}
v1.2.0

{# page.translations carries the same page in every language. #} {% if page.translations | length > 1 %}
{% for t in page.translations %} {{ t.code | upper }} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# theme.js rewrites this label with the resolved mode on load. #}
